text:
Olympic star Tom Daley gave his diving partner Noah Williams an X-rated gift for his 21st birthday.

The dynamic diving duopicked up a silver medal in Parisas the pair captured the nation's hearts with a stunning performance in the Men's Synchronised 10m. Speaking for aQ&A on Daley’s YouTube channel, Daley revealed that he actually knitted a c*ck sock for Williams when they were both competing in Budapest.

The pair opened up about the not-safe-for-work gift after one fan sent in a blunt question asking Daley how he knew what size to knit the sock. Daley then responded candidly that he goes by a "one size fits all" mantra.

Williams, 23, then asked Daley: “The other part of that question is are you surprised I’ve actually worn it a few times?” to which the diving icon responded, “No, I’m not”. It was then disclosed that Williams actually posted a photo of him wearing the garment on his new OnlyFans channel.

Williams has already turned heads once during the Games with the saucy revelation that, along with some of his fellow athletes, he hasjoined the subscription platform OnlyFans.

Along with diverJack Laugher, 2020 Olympic gold medalist Matty Lee, ten-metre synchro champion Daniel Goodfellow, and ten-metre star Matthew Dixon, Williams found an innovative way to supplement his income while training forthe Olympicsby selling racy photos of himself. However, sources withinTeam GBand diving governing body Aquatics GB said their feelings on the matter are "very relaxed".One insider even confessed that the athlete's training programme is so time-consuming that there is little chance for them to earn money outside of the pool, with the athlete's jump to the X-rated site materialising due to the competitors receiving funding of just £28,000 a year.



Daley had no such issue with Williams taking his creations to the world on the site and was clearly charmed by Williams modelling his creation on his OnlyFans, admitting that it's “nice" that his gifts are actually utilised. He then added: "Most of the time people use it as a little novelty thing that never actually gets used.”

Away from his headline-grabbing dives, Daley has caught the eye away from the board with many fans now accustomed to seeing the 30-year-old busy with his knitting needles in the stands as he cheers on his fellow Team GB athletes. Daley is prolific with his hobby and even whipped upa giant rainbow penisfor Sex Education actress Gillian Anderson last year,Queertyreports.

Daley only entered the 10m synchro event so his Olympic Games have come to an end but his diving partner Wiliams will have another opportunity to take home a medal when he competes in the 10m Platform event later this week.

title: Tom Daley gave diving partner Noah Williams X-rated gift | Other | Sport | Express.co.uk
author: Chris Burns
description: Daley and Williams captured a silver medal at the Olympic Games last week but the pair have also gained attention for their racy activities outside of the pool
